# APP_TALLER Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements.
  Summary: Proyecto solicitado en PHP + MySQL con nombre APP_TALLER y ubicacion en C:\Users\Chris\Desktop\Taller.
- [x] Scaffold the Project.
  Summary: Se creo la estructura base con carpetas public, src, config, database, templates, storage/logs y archivos iniciales.
- [x] Customize the Project.
  Summary: Se agrego conexion PDO, variables de entorno, ruta de healthcheck, SQL inicial y pagina principal.
- [x] Install Required Extensions.
  Summary: No extensions needed.
- [x] Compile the Project.
  Summary: PHP 8.3 instalado y configurado con pdo_mysql; verificacion funcional realizada con healthcheck.
- [x] Create and Run Task.
  Summary: Omitido para este scaffold base; no se requiere tasks.json para comenzar.
- [x] Launch the Project.
  Summary: APP_TALLER levantado en http://localhost:8000 con DB local conectada.
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete.
  Summary: README.md creado y checklist actualizado sin comentarios HTML.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
